run.label: q1_catalog_halo_phase_shift_cardinality_prior_30seed
run.evidence_level: catalog ballistic halo phase-shift benchmark with an explicit target-active-fraction objective prior; target is generated by zero-thrust CR3BP phase propagation of the JPL NRHO-like source state, not by a low-thrust teacher; 30-seed statistical package covering all main methods

target_state_generation: ballistic CR3BP phase propagation of initial_nrho_like_l2_southern_halo for benchmark.phase_time

target_metadata.target_state_generation: ballistic CR3BP phase propagation of initial_nrho_like_l2_southern_halo for benchmark.phase_time

refinement_description: single_sequence optimizes one open-loop control sequence; branch_recovery optimizes nominal controls plus selected-outage-specific post-outage recovery controls
control_bound: refined piecewise-constant acceleration vectors are projected to the Euclidean ball ||u_i|| <= amax before propagation and persistence; component-wise optimizer bounds remain only as finite-variable guards
true_evaluation_accounting: true_evaluations equals total_true_evaluations_including_training; solver_true_evaluations excludes shared QUBO training; shared_qubo_training_evaluations is charged to surrogate_qubo_sa and qaoa_statevector; all_windows_continuous reports optimizer nfev as solver_true_evaluations because it has no discrete schedule-search stage

descriptions.prefix_to_last_active: heuristic dense-availability envelope: set every window through the last active solver window to available, preserving later zeros

schedule_repairs.scientific_framing: Configured repairs are deterministic heuristic dense-availability envelopes applied before continuous refinement; they are not oracle continuous controls and do not by themselves establish quantum advantage.

diagnostic_baselines: No teacher-seeded schedule or teacher-controls oracle baseline is enabled for this run.
claims_limit: controlled normalized CR3BP initialization benchmark; not flight-ready trajectory optimization

trajectory_example_selection.selection_policy: best non-diagnostic row by refined_worst_error,worst_error; diagnostic rows are used only when no non-diagnostic rows exist
